# Titan Air Conditioning & Heating LLC
> Licensed HVAC contractor serving Sugar Land, Texas and surrounding communities. Over 10 years of professional AC and heating service.

## Owner
Agustin Salas — Founder, licensed HVAC technician with 10+ years experience

## Services
- AC Repair: Diagnosis and repair of all residential air conditioning systems
- AC Installation: New central AC systems, ductless mini-splits, and system replacements
- Heating Repair: Furnace and heat pump diagnosis and repair
- Heating Installation: New furnace installation, heat pump installation, system upgrades
- Maintenance Plans: Twice-yearly preventive maintenance for AC and heating systems
- Indoor Air Quality: Air purifiers, UV lights, duct cleaning, humidity control

## Service Area
Sugar Land, Missouri City, Rosenberg, Richmond, Katy, Houston SW (Fort Bend County and surrounding areas)

## Credentials
- Texas HVAC License: TACLB135324E
- Fully insured
- 5-star Google reviews
- 10+ years in business
- Family-owned and operated

## Contact
- Phone: (832) 910-6259
